raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a {$4300.00} charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX for XXXX returned items ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ). The merchant falsely claimed only the XXXX head was returned. I provided timestamped photos showing all items in the box with the USPS label visible. 

Amex denied my dispute, stating I ignored their XXXX  return label, but XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX own XXXX XXXX clearly says : This is not a prepaid shipping label. Please use this label with the XXXX of your choice. No XXXX  label was provided or required, and USPS tracking shows delivery. 

Later, XXXX XXXX  XXXX confirmed in a written XXXX  response that the customers account will be credited. Despite that admission, Amex refused to honor it or reopen the case. This shows an unfair and incomplete investigation where Amex ignored direct merchant confirmation and my documented proof. I request the CFPB ensure Amex reopens the case and issues the proper refund.
